content.json:
Version 1.0

This dashboard offers a detailed visual representation of alerts generated specifically for the Tier Model.

For optimal functionality, it is essential that all Domain Controllers forward EventLog Security events to Sentinel. Additionally, the Tier Model Analytical Rules and Automation Rules must be activated within Sentinel.

content.query:
let AR = SecurityAlert
| extend AR_Name = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Analytic Rule Name"])
| extend AR_ID = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Analytic Rule Ids"]))[0])
| where AR_Name startswith "PROD (TM"
| distinct AR_Name
         , AR_ID;
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| extend AR_ID = tostring(RelatedAnalyticRuleIds[0])
| join kind=inner AR on $left.AR_ID == $right.AR_ID
| where Status == "New"
     or Status == "Active"
| summarize LatestRecord = arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| summarize CountByStatus = count() by Status
content.title: # Incident New/Active

content.query:
let AR = SecurityAlert
| extend AR_Name = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Analytic Rule Name"])
| extend AR_ID = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Analytic Rule Ids"]))[0])
| where AR_Name startswith "PROD (TM"
| distinct AR_Name
         , AR_ID;
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| extend AR_ID = tostring(RelatedAnalyticRuleIds[0])
| join kind=inner AR on $left.AR_ID == $right.AR_ID
| where Severity == "High"
| summarize LatestRecord = arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| summarize CountByStatus = count() by Severity
content.title: # High Incidents

| summarize LatestRecord = arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber

| extend AR_ID = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Analytic Rule Ids"]))[0])
| where AR_Name startswith "PROD (TM"
| distinct AR_Name
         , AR_ID;
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| extend AR_ID = tostring(RelatedAnalyticRuleIds[0])
| join kind=inner AR on $left.AR_ID == $right.AR_ID
| where Severity  == "Informational"
| summarize LatestRecord = arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| summarize CountByStatus = count() by Severity

content.query:
let AR = SecurityAlert
| extend AR_Name = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Analytic Rule Name"])
| extend AR_ID = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Analytic Rule Ids"]))[0])
| where AR_Name startswith "PROD (TM"
| distinct AR_Name
         , AR_ID;
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| extend AR_ID = tostring(RelatedAnalyticRuleIds[0])
| join kind=inner AR on $left.AR_ID == $right.AR_ID
| where Status == "Closed"
| summarize LatestRecord = arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| summarize CountByStatus = count() by Status

content.query:
let AR = SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| extend AR_Name = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Analytic Rule Name"])
| extend AR_ID = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Analytic Rule Ids"]))[0])
| where AR_Name startswith "PROD (TM"
| distinct AR_Name
         , AR_ID;
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| extend AR_ID = tostring(RelatedAnalyticRuleIds[0])
| join kind=inner AR on $left.AR_ID == $right.AR_ID
| summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), Severity
| render timechart
content.title: Time of Incident by Severity {TimeRange:query}

content.query:
let AR = SecurityAlert
| extend AR_Name = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Analytic Rule Name"])
| extend AR_ID = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Analytic Rule Ids"]))[0])
| where AR_Name startswith "PROD (TM"
| distinct AR_Name
         , AR_ID;
let High = SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| extend AR_ID = tostring(RelatedAnalyticRuleIds[0])
| join kind=inner AR on $left.AR_ID == $right.AR_ID
| where Severity == "High"
| summarize LatestRecord = arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| summarize CountByStatus = count() by Severity;
let Medium = SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| extend AR_ID = tostring(RelatedAnalyticRuleIds[0])
| join kind=inner AR on $left.AR_ID == $right.AR_ID
| where Severity == "Medium"
| summarize LatestRecord = arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| summarize CountByStatus = count() by Severity;
let Low = SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| extend AR_ID = tostring(RelatedAnalyticRuleIds[0])
| join kind=inner AR on $left.AR_ID == $right.AR_ID
| where Severity == "Low"
| summarize LatestRecord = arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| summarize CountByStatus = count() by Severity;
let Informational = SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| extend AR_ID = tostring(RelatedAnalyticRuleIds[0])
| join kind=inner AR on $left.AR_ID == $right.AR_ID
| where Severity == "Informational"
| summarize LatestRecord = arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| summarize CountByStatus = count() by Severity;
union High
    , Medium
    , Low
    , Informational
content.title: Severity Comparison

parameters.name: Status
parameters.query:
let AR = SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| extend AR_Name = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Analytic Rule Name"])
| extend AR_ID = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Analytic Rule Ids"]))[0])
| where AR_Name startswith "PROD (TM"
| distinct AR_Name
         , AR_ID;
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| extend AR_ID = tostring(RelatedAnalyticRuleIds[0])
| join kind=inner AR on $left.AR_ID == $right.AR_ID
| distinct Status

parameters.name: Severity
parameters.query:
let AR = SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| extend Analytic_Name = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Analytic Rule Name"])
| extend Analytic_ID = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Analytic Rule Ids"]))[0])
| extend Domain = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Custom Details"])).Domain))[0])
| extend Object_Tier = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Custom Details"])).ObjectTier))[0])
| extend Object_Type = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Custom Details"])).ObjectType))[0])
| extend Activity_Type = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Custom Details"])).ActivityType))[0])
| where Analytic_Name startswith "PROD (TM"
| distinct Analytic_Name
         , Analytic_ID
         , Domain
         , Object_Tier
         , Object_Type
         , Activity_Type;
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| extend Analytic_ID = tostring(RelatedAnalyticRuleIds[0])
| join kind=inner AR on $left.Analytic_ID == $right.Analytic_ID
| summarize LatestRecord = arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| distinct Severity

parameters.name: Domain
parameters.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(90d)
| extend Analytic_Name = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Analytic Rule Name"])
| extend Domain = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Custom Details"])).Domain))[0])
| where Analytic_Name startswith "PROD (TM"
| distinct Label=Domain

parameters.name: Tier
parameters.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| extend Analytic_Name = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Analytic Rule Name"])
| extend Domain = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Custom Details"])).Domain))[0])
| extend Object_Tier = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Custom Details"])).ObjectTier))[0])
| where Analytic_Name startswith "PROD (TM"
| where Domain in ({Domain}) or '{Domain:label}' == "All"
| distinct Label=Object_Tier

parameters.name: Object_Class
parameters.label: Object Class
parameters.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| extend Analytic_Name = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Analytic Rule Name"])
| extend Object_Type = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Custom Details"])).ObjectType))[0])
| where Analytic_Name startswith "PROD (TM"
| distinct Object_Type

parameters.name: Activity_Type
parameters.label: Activity Type
parameters.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| extend Analytic_Name = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Analytic Rule Name"])
| extend Activity_Type = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Custom Details"])).ActivityType))[0])
| where Analytic_Name startswith "PROD (TM"
| distinct Activity_Type

content.query:
let AR = SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| extend Analytic_Name = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Analytic Rule Name"])
| extend Analytic_ID = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Analytic Rule Ids"]))[0])
| extend Domain = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Custom Details"])).Domain))[0])
| extend Object_Tier = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Custom Details"])).ObjectTier))[0])
| extend Object_Type = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Custom Details"])).ObjectType))[0])
| extend Activity_Type = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["Custom Details"])).ActivityType))[0])
| where Analytic_Name startswith "PROD (TM"
| distinct Analytic_Name
         , Analytic_ID
         , Domain
         , Object_Tier
         , Object_Type
         , Activity_Type;
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| extend Analytic_ID = tostring(RelatedAnalyticRuleIds[0])
| join kind=inner AR on $left.Analytic_ID == $right.Analytic_ID
| summarize LatestRecord = arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| where Status startswith "{Status:query}"
| where Severity in ({Severity}) or '{Severity:label}' == "All"
| where Domain in ({Domain}) or '{Domain:label}' == "All"
| where Object_Tier in ({Tier}) or '{Tier:label}' == "All"
| where Object_Type in ({Object_Class}) or '{Object_Class:label}' == "All"
| where Activity_Type in ({Activity_Type}) or '{Activity_Type:label}' == "All"
| project LatestRecord
        , Title
        , IncidentNumber
        , Status
        , Severity
        , Domain
        , Object_Tier
        , Object_Type
        , Activity_Type
        , FirstActivityTime
        , LastActivityTime
        , IncidentUrl
        , Analytic_Name
        , Analytic_ID
| take 250
